properties.name: admin.name
properties.description: Display name for the bootstrap admin account.

properties.name: admin.email
properties.description: Login email for the bootstrap admin account.

properties.name: admin.password
properties.description: Plain-text password for the bootstrap admin account (stored BCrypt-hashed).

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens. Must be at least 256 bits (32 characters).
